subject: Install all MVP dependencies (Supabase, Stripe, TailwindCSS, etc.)
description: Install @supabase/supabase-js, @supabase/ssr, stripe, lucide-react, sonner, react-qrcode-logo, clsx as deps. Install tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/postcss, postcss, autoprefixer, eslint, eslint-config-next as devDeps.
